turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Hi, you've reached the cancellations team. What can I do for you?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Just so you're aware, we record these calls for training.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Can you confirm the name and email on the account first?

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Yeah, the email's my usual one and the name matches.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: I'd like to close my account effective today.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Sorry to hear that. Let me pull up your plan and walk you through it.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I can cancel today, just so you know it stays active until the cycle ends.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Okay, so I won't be charged again after this, right?

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: This is exactly why I'm leaving. Put someone senior on.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I'm sorry, that wasn't my intent. Let me get a senior agent for you.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Your cancellation is confirmed for the end of the cycle. Anything else?
